blocks.content: By October, college was all anyone talked about at lunch.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I want everyone to be honest with me. Are we making a plan or are we just letting this happen.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: We're eighteen, Eli.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: People make plans at eighteen. Generals make plans at eighteen. I'm just saying we should acknowledge that August exists.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: Where are you even applying.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: State. Maybe two others. I like my options open. Kit — what about you.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Few places.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: That's not an answer.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: State. A couple others. Still working on it.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Minnesota's my first. I'm applying early action.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Minnesota. As in —

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Minneapolis, yes.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: That's a long drive from here.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I know.
Kit looked at his tray. Minneapolis.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Savannah?

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I'm applying to four places. I'll tell you when I have something to tell.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Reasonable. I respect the process.
Kit looked up. Daisy was looking at him. She looked away first.
